home.hero_subtitle: BSF NutriFeed is an affordable, sustainable poultry feed made from Black Soldier Fly larvae — helping Nigerian farmers grow healthier livestock for less.
home.section_tag: The Feed Crisis Has a Solution
home.section_title: Stop Wasting Money on Overpriced Feed
home.section_body: Since 2022, conventional feed prices in Nigeria have risen over 60%. BSF NutriFeed was built as the direct answer — converting organic waste into high-protein livestock feed that costs less, performs better, and is produced locally.
home.why_switch: Why Farmers Are Making the Switch
home.edu_what_title: What is Black Soldier Fly Feed?
home.edu_what_body: Black Soldier Fly larvae are rich in protein and healthy fats. When processed into feed, they provide everything poultry needs to grow at a fraction of the cost of conventional feed.
home.edu_safe_body: Yes. BSF feed has been tested and used across Africa and Asia. Farmers report equal or better growth rates compared to traditional feed brands like Skretting and Chikun.
home.edu_trust_body: Farmers from Lagos to Kaduna are already using BSF NutriFeed. Price complaints about conventional feed have intensified since 2024.
home.step1_body: Enter the number of birds, growth stage, and feeding duration into our calculator.
home.step2_body: Receive instant, research-backed feed quantity estimates tailored to your flock.
home.step3_body: Monitor feed production, growth rates, and alerts in real time on your farm dashboard.
home.quote_text: Since switching to BSF NutriFeed, my feed costs have dropped by almost 40%. My birds are growing faster and I have more money left at the end of each month.
home.quote_author: Amina Bello, Poultry Farmer — Kaduna State
home.benefits_title: Improve Poultry Health With Data-Driven Nutrition
home.benefit1_body: Significantly cheaper than conventional feed — reducing your monthly costs.
home.benefit2_body: Made from organic waste, reducing environmental impact on your community.
home.benefit3_body: High protein content from BSF larvae that supports faster growth and healthier livestock.
home.cta_subtitle: Join farmers across Nigeria already using BSF NutriFeed.

calculator.title: Feed Calculator

calculator.how_works_body: Our calculator uses research-backed daily feed intake rates based on your birds growth stage.

dashboard.alert_stock_low: Starter stock running low. Consider restocking within 5 days.
dashboard.alert_grower_stage: Batch 3 birds entering Grower stage this week.
dashboard.alert_report_ready: Weekly growth report ready for review.

learn.title: Understanding BSF Feed
learn.subtitle: Everything a Nigerian farmer needs to know about Black Soldier Fly feed — the science, the safety, the economics.
learn.article1_title: Why Black Soldier Fly Larvae Are a Superior Protein Source
learn.article1_body: Black Soldier Fly larvae contain 40-45% crude protein on a dry matter basis, comparable to fishmeal. BSF larvae also contain lauric acid, a fatty acid with natural antimicrobial properties. This means healthier birds with fewer inputs.
learn.article2_title: Is Insect-Based Feed Safe for Nigerian Poultry?
learn.article2_body: Yes. BSF feed has been approved and tested in multiple African markets. Studies confirm no adverse health outcomes in broilers or layers fed BSF-based diets. Growth rates match or exceed those of conventional feed.
learn.article3_title: The Feed Cost Crisis and Why BSF Is the Answer
learn.article3_body: Since 2022, the cost of conventional poultry feed in Nigeria has risen over 60%. BSF larvae can be produced locally using organic waste with minimal infrastructure. BSF NutriFeed passes that saving directly to farmers.
learn.article4_title: How BSF Feed Reduces Waste and Environmental Pressure
learn.article4_body: Each tonne of BSF larvae produced converts approximately 2-4 tonnes of organic waste into feed. This circular model reduces landfill burden, lowers methane emissions, and produces nitrogen-rich frass that works as a natural fertiliser.
learn.trust_title: Built on Evidence, Not Just Promise
learn.trust_body1: BSF NutriFeed is grounded in agricultural research from institutions across Africa, Asia, and Europe. Farmers using BSF-based diets report consistent results — better weight gain, lower mortality, and reduced feed costs.
learn.trust_body2: If you are transitioning from a conventional feed brand, expect a 2-week adjustment period. Most farmers report full adaptation and visible results within 30 days.

privacy.title: Your data belongs to you
privacy.subtitle: Written in plain language. Compliant with Nigeria Data Protection Act 2023.
privacy.summary1_note: Not to advertisers. Not to anyone.
privacy.section1_title: What We Collect and What We Do Not
privacy.section1_body: If you use the calculator without an account, we store nothing on our servers. Your results are saved only in your browser. If you create an account, we collect your name, email, and password stored as a secure hash we cannot read. Farm details are optional and used only to personalise your recommendations.
privacy.section2_title: Why We Collect It and What We Never Do With It
privacy.section2_body: We use your data to run your account, personalise your feed recommendations, and with your consent to improve the app. We never sell your data. We never use it for advertising. We never share it with third parties outside the NutriFeed team.
privacy.section3_title: You Are in Full Control of Your Data
privacy.section3_body: Under Nigeria Data Protection Act 2023, you have the right to access, correct, and delete all data we hold about you. Email privacy@nutrifeed.ng and we will respond within 72 hours.
privacy.section4_body: All data in transit is encrypted with HTTPS. Passwords are stored using bcrypt hashing — even our team cannot read your password. If there is ever a security incident, we will notify you by email within 72 hours.
privacy.section5_body: Essential cookies keep you logged in and remember your settings. Analytics cookies are optional and anonymous. Personalisation cookies save your preferences. We use zero advertising cookies and zero cross-site tracking.
privacy.section6_body: Email privacy@nutrifeed.ng for any data question. We respond within 48 hours. You may also file a complaint with Nigeria Information Technology Development Agency under NDPA 2023.
privacy.manage_body: You can update your cookie consent at any time. Resetting your preferences will bring up the consent banner on your next page visit.
privacy.reset_alert: Consent preferences reset. The cookie banner will appear on your next visit.

terms.title: Rules of using BSF NutriFeed
terms.subtitle: Plain language. No legal jargon. Last updated April 2026.
terms.section1_body: By creating an account on BSF NutriFeed, you agree to these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, do not create an account. These terms apply to all users of the platform.
terms.section2_body: You are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure. You must not share your account with anyone else. You must provide accurate information when creating your account.
terms.section3_title: How You May Use the App
terms.section3_body: You may use BSF NutriFeed only for lawful purposes related to farm feed management. You must not attempt to damage the platform, submit false information, or access accounts that are not yours.
terms.section4_body: The feed calculator provides estimates based on research-backed daily feed intake rates. These are recommendations only. Actual requirements may vary depending on your specific farm conditions.
terms.section5_body: The data you enter into BSF NutriFeed belongs to you. We use it only to provide the service and improve recommendations. We do not sell it. See our Privacy Policy for full details.
terms.section6_body: We may update these terms as the platform grows. If we make significant changes, we will notify you by email at least 14 days before they take effect.
terms.section7_body: For any questions, contact us at legal@nutrifeed.ng. We respond within 48 hours. These terms are governed by the laws of the Federal Republic of Nigeria.
terms.cta_body: If anything in these terms is unclear, reach out before you create an account.

consent.title: We respect your privacy
consent.body: NutriFeed uses cookies to make the app work and, optionally, to understand how farmers use the calculator. We never sell your data.

consent.analytics_desc: Anonymous data on which features farmers use most.
consent.personalisation_desc: Saves your calculator preferences between visits.
